items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'offline scanning capability' requirement, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this capability is implemented or functioning. The linked use case mentions the need for offline scanning, yet the prior steps do not include any details or evidence regarding the actual implementation of this feature. This indicates a lack of sufficient evidence to assert whether the requirement is satisfied or not.
